---
title: "Publications"
---

# Publications

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

### Enhancing Healthcare in Africa: A Brief Review of Lung Cancer Prediction and Detection (2025)

Pinto JK, Kasereka SK, Muchapa PT, Ilunga GWK, Mbayandjambe AM, Olani JK, Tashev T, Kyamakya K.

*Procedia Computer Science*, 265, 390–397.

DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.procs.2025.07.196

---

### Factors Influencing Exclusive Breastfeeding Practice among Under-Six-Month Infants in Ethiopia (2022)

Published in *BMC Pregnancy and Childbirth*.

---

### Analysis of Determinants of Neonatal Mortality in Afar and Somalia Regions, Ethiopia (2022)

Published in *Journal of Pharmaceutical Research International*.

---

### Prevalence and Determinants of Anemia among Reproductive-Aged Women in Ethiopia (2021)

Published in *Journal of Pharmaceutical Research International*.

---

# Manuscripts Under Review

### Bayesian Multilevel Logistic Regression Model on Infant Mortality in Ethiopia: Evidence from EDHS 2019

Under review in *Journal of Big Data*.

---

### Determinants of Infant Mortality in Ethiopia: A Multilevel Count Regression Models

Under review in *BMC Pregnancy and Childbirth*.

---

### Missed Opportunities in Maternal Healthcare Utilization and Neonatal Mortality in Ethiopia

Under review in *Journal of Big Data*.

---

### An Interpretable Data-Mining Model for Predicting Missed Newborn Postnatal Care in Ethiopia

Conference paper at EUSPN-26, *Procedia Computer Science*.

---

# Research Interests

- Bayesian modeling
- Spatial epidemiology
- Public health AI
- Federated learning
- Clinical prediction modeling
- Maternal and child health
- Malaria burden analysis
